nasb.text: My Father, who has given them to Me, is greater than all; and no one is able to snatch them out of the Father’s hand.

esv.text: My Father, who has given them to me,is greater than all, and no one is able to snatch them out of the Father’s hand.

cnv.text: 那位把羊群賜給我的父比一切都大，也沒有人能把他們從我父的手裡奪去。

ccb.text: 我父把羊赐给我，祂比万物都大，没有人能从祂手中把羊抢走。

csbs.text: 我父，就是把他们赐给我的那一位，他比一切更大。谁也不能把他们从我父的手中夺走。
